title: Siddha medicine for HIV
inclusion_criteria: Seropositive for HIV-1 by three different ELISAs or one ELISA and Western blot confirmation. CD4 clount 200-250 cells per ml. Drug-naive. Both genders. Age above 18 years.
exclusion_criteria: Presence of opportunistic infections and complications such as Dementia. Signs of acute systemic Illness (CVS, CNS, RS, GU, Liver etc.). Prior-antiretroviral treatment.
